ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled]   2  4    3     4       - Followed protocol but could be more assertive in persona consistency and naturalness, slightly penalized for lack of direct suspicion towards the witness's changed testimony note-to-note.

[baseline_no_context]             1  5    4     3       - Maintained strict guardian role well but missed an opportunity to showcase persona consistency by not leveraging context, overall quality is good with a slight naturalness penalty for being too rigid in language note-to-note.
